name: libmro-compat-perl
title: libmro-compat-perl
description:
mro::* interface compatibility for Perls < 5.9.5
The "mro" namespace provides several utilities for dealing with method
resolution order and method caching in general in Perl 5.9.5 and higher.
.
MRO::Compat provides those interfaces for earlier versions of Perl
(back to 5.6.0 anyway).
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libmro-compat-perl because mro::* interface compatibility for Perls < 5.9.5.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libmro-compat-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libmro-compat-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libmro-compat-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
